title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search publishes a news roundup covering recent AI developments including 3D generation (Pixal3D), world models (Sana-WM), small language models (MiniCPM), text-to-speech (Krea2, DramaBox), and ChatGPT feature updates. The video demonstrates applications across 3D synthesis, video generation, voice cloning, motion capture, and financial tools.
